description: Landing-page testimonial-style block written in first-person founder voice with no disclosure of the relationship to FarmThru — should fail ADV-005.
text:
What I love about this raise.

I started FarmThru because I was sick of watching good farmers get paid badly. The model we've built proves you can do this differently — pay growers properly, keep prices honest for shoppers, and still build a real business.

I've put my own savings into this. I genuinely believe what we're doing is the future of grocery in this country. If you've ever wanted to back something that pays people fairly, I think you'll get a lot out of being on the cap table.

— Sarah

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
